message.content:
@startuml
package FactoryMethodPersona {
    title PersonaFactoryMethod
}

package PersonaFactory {
    actor PersonaFactoryMethod as PersonaFactoryMethod
    interface PersonaFactory as PersonaFactory

    PersonaFactoryMethod <<interface>>
    PersonaFactoryMethod.createPersona(id)

    PersonaFactory <<interface>>
}

package Persona {
    actor Persona as Persona
    interface Persona as Persona
}

package Cliente {
    actor Cliente as Cliente
}

package Mecanico {
    actor Mecanico as Mecanico
}

package Oficinista {
    actor Oficinista as Oficinista
}

package Empleado {
    actor Empleado as Empleado
}

PersonaFactoryMethod..> PersonaFactoryMethod
PersonaFactoryMethod..> PersonaFactory
